title: HATE full implementation readiness gate

blocking_risks.scenario: P0a preparation evidence is mistaken for full implementation evidence.
DQ, adapter failure, and exit code behavior are not executable.
QEG bundle is missing, so HATE is not yet a proven optional evidence producer.

reasons: P0a executable CLI, minimal adapters, DQ negative fixtures, and execution evidence exist.
QEG bundle, AETE, and workflow artifacts are still missing.
P0b and later phases are mostly documented contracts without generated artifacts or validation logs.
P2/P3 product readiness requires artifact and metric evidence that does not exist yet.
minimum_go_conditions: P0a CLI generates all required outputs from the golden fixture.
DQ negative fixtures reproduce expected decision and exit code.
P0b qeg-bundle, evidence-map, and diff-risk-test are generated and validated.
P1b workflow, Shipyard, and RanD mapping artifacts are generated.
If P2/P3 are included in the full claim, product-readiness-report and PRG metrics are generated.
